title: Yededho Lyrics Saithan
stanzas:
Saithan Yededho Song Lyrics
Singer :Vijay Antony
Music : Vijay Antony
Lyrics : Eknaath

yedhedho yedhedho
aagi poche
en kannadi koondil
un kal vandhu
modhi poche

idhu enna pudhu valiya
unakadhu theriyalaya
enakullae yedhum pilayaa
enai naane
thaedum nilayaa. (3)

nee irundha veetile
en ninaivu vasikkum
nee anaitha niyabagam
ennuyirai kudikkum

nee padutha methayil
en urakkam marikkum
sollu penne
engirukkiraai.

neeyum naanum ondrena
pesikonda pazhakkam
nee ennai vittu
ponathan yaekkam
vandhu thudikkum

nee illadha vazhkai
en nenjai suttu erikkum
sollu penne
engirukkiraai.

yedhedho yedhedho
aagi poche
en kannadi koondil
un kal vandhu
modhi poche

idhu enna pudhu valiya
unakadhu theriyalaya
enakullae yedhum pilayaa
enai naane
thaedum nilayaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yededho?

Yededho explores themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of separation.

How does this song fit into the plot of Saithan?

The song captures a pivotal moment in Saithan, highlighting the protagonist's emotional struggles and memories of love.

Who is the singer and music director of Yededho?

The song is sung and composed by Vijay Antony, showcasing his dual talent in music.

When was Yededho released?

Yededho was released on December 1, 2016, as part of the Saithan soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yededho, the protagonist grapples with the pain of lost love, as expressed through Vijay Antony's emotive vocals. The song serves as a poignant reflection of memories that linger, encapsulating the melancholic essence of heartbreak. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Eknaath, it evokes a deep sense of nostalgia and longing. This track beautifully complements the narrative of Saithan, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yededho from Saithan is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of longing and heartbreak. With Vijay Antony's soulful voice and poignant lyrics by Eknaath, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. Dive into the emotional depths of this track that beautifully blends melody and sentiment.
stanzaMeanings: Something has changed, my reflection in the mirror has transformed with your presence.
What is this new path? You don't seem to know. Inside me, nothing is clear; I am searching for my own place.
In the house where you are, my memories reside, and every thought of you consumes my life.
The dreams you create on the bed will make me forget my sleep; tell me, girl, where are you?
You and I have a habit of talking as if we are one; you left me, and now I feel a sudden pain.
Life without you burns my heart; tell me, girl, where are you?
Truly, truly, I cannot see my tears...
Truly, truly, after you left, there is no life left...
Something has changed, my reflection in the mirror has transformed with your presence.
What is this new path? You don't seem to know. Inside me, nothing is clear; I am searching for my own place.
